flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Brightpoint Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Brightpoint Community College rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 (12.8% → 15.8%).
